headline: High Gas Prices Are Tempting Americans Back to EVs
summary: Sales of electric vehicles plunged after the president ended a $7,500 tax credit, but high gas prices just helped drive a 12% jump in used-EV sales.

raw.headline: High Gas Prices Are Tempting Americans Back to EVs
